product: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines parameters are now in Beta
tagline: Pipeline parameters let you define key value pairs at the pipeline level and reference them from SQL source code using named parameter syntax.
what_it_does: Pipeline parameters let you define key value pairs at the pipeline level and reference them from SQL source code using named parameter syntax. Pipeline parameters let you reuse the same pipeline source code across environments or datasets. For example, you can run the same transformations against dev and prod catalogs, or ingest from a different source path on each run.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Pipeline parameters let you define key value pairs at the pipeline level and reference them from SQL source code using named parameter syntax. Pipeline parameters let you reuse the same pipeline source code across environments or datasets.

capabilities.desc: A job that contains a pipeline task and is configured with maxconcurrentruns more than one.

capabilities.desc: A pipeline task wrapped in a for-each task, regardless of the iteration count.

key_takeaway: Pipeline parameters let you define key value pairs at the pipeline level and reference them from SQL source code using named parameter syntax.
